title: Service
description: A Service entity represents an upstream API or microservice that Kong Gateway forwards requests to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Service.

name.description: An optional human-readable name for the Service.

protocol.description: The protocol used to communicate with the upstream.

host.description: The host of the upstream server.

path.description: The path to be used in requests to the upstream server.

retries.description: The number of retries to execute upon failure to proxy.

connect_timeout.description: The timeout in milliseconds for establishing a connection to the upstream server.

write_timeout.description: The timeout in milliseconds between two successive write operations for transmitting a request to the upstream server.

read_timeout.description: The timeout in milliseconds between two successive read operations for receiving a request from the upstream server.

url.description: Shorthand attribute to set protocol, host, port, and path at once. Write-only convenience field.

tags.description: An optional set of strings for grouping and filtering.

client_certificate.description: Certificate to be used as client certificate while TLS handshaking to the upstream server.

tls_verify.description: Whether to enable TLS verification of upstream server certificate.

tls_verify_depth.description: Maximum depth of chain while verifying upstream server TLS certificate.

ca_certificates.description: Array of CA Certificate object UUIDs used to verify upstream server TLS certificate.

created_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp of when the entity was created.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp of when the entity was last updated.
